tasks.description: Create PACT mandate verification lib — inline HMAC-SHA256, no npm import
Expose GET /.well-known/x402 discovery manifest — SAP merchant registration
Implement POST /api/sap/execute — SAP merchant endpoint that accepts X-Payment headers, verifies escrow, serves action
One-shot script: update Invoica SAP on-chain metadata to include x402Endpoint URL
tasks.context:
BACKGROUND:
Invoica's SAP agent PDA (F7ZgQpK1yXahRrHav5DFfaibuMEcNHn8KVBHWWsKop7P) was registered on Solana mainnet but the x402Endpoint field was left blank. External agents probing the registry see capabilities but no callable endpoint. We need to run a one-shot script to update the metadata.

The SAP client is available at backend/src/lib/sap-client.ts (getSapClient()). Check what update/register methods it exposes. If it has agent.update() or agent.setEndpoint(), use it. If not, use the @synapse-sap/sdk directly if available in node_modules.

If neither SDK method is available, create the script using @solana/web3.js to send a raw updateAgent instruction to program SAPpUhsWLJG1FfkGRcXagEDMrMsWGjbky7AyhGpFETZ. The server keypair is available via process.env.SERVER_KEYPAIR_PATH or process.env.SAP_KEYPAIR (check .env for the right key name — look for KEYPAIR, WALLET, or PRIVATE_KEY env vars).

TASK: Create scripts/sap-update-x402endpoint.ts (~80 lines).

The script must:
1. Load the Invoica server keypair from env
2. Connect to Solana mainnet
3. Call the SAP program's updateAgent instruction (or SDK equivalent) to set:
   x402Endpoint = 'https://api.invoica.ai/api/sap/execute'
4. Print the transaction signature on success
5. Be runnable as: npx ts-node scripts/sap-update-x402endpoint.ts

IMPORTANT: Check sap-client.ts first. If getSapClient().agent.update() or similar exists, use it — don't reinvent. Also check what env vars are available for the keypair (look at .env.example or other scripts that send Solana transactions).

This is a one-shot migration script. It does NOT need to be wired into PM2 or cron.

AFTER:
1. Script compiles: npx tsc --noEmit scripts/sap-update-x402endpoint.ts 2>&1 | grep error
   Expected: 0 errors
2. Print instructions for running: 'To apply on server: npx ts-node scripts/sap-update-x402endpoint.ts'
3. Do NOT run the script — just write and compile it. Tarek will execute it manually.
